name: Thai Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the lettuce, tomatoes, onion, carrot, and cucumber in a salad bowl and lightly toss.
2. Add the tofu and sprouts to the salad.
3. Drizzle with the peanut-coconut milk dressing and garnish with potato chips.
4. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine the coconut milk and red curry paste until the mixture turns a pale amber color and has a thin coat of oil on the surface.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan and stir over low heat for 7 to 10 minutes, or until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed. The color should be a pale cocoa brown.
6. Allow the dressing to cool to room temperature for one hour before serving with the salad.
The dressing will keep in the refrigerator for up to a month, but it may thicken over time. To restore its consistency, add 1/2 teaspoon to 1 tablespoon of white vinegar and stir vigorously.
